qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Consider the table employee(empId, name, department, salary) and the two queries below. Assuming that department has more than one employee, and we want to find the employees who get higher salary than anyone in the department which one of the statements is TRUE for any arbitrary employee table? Sel

qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Consider the following relational schema: Consider the following relational query on the above database: SELECT S.sname FROM Suppliers S WHERE S.sid NOT IN (SELECT C.sid FROM Catalog C WHERE C.pid NOT IN (SELECT P.pid FROM Parts P WHERE P.color<>'blue'))
